title: TNT Every 15 Seconds
description: Can you beat Minecraft while TNT spawns on you every 15 seconds? A fun way to challenge yourself!
body:
# TNT Every 15 Seconds
Can you beat Minecraft while TNT spawns on you every 15 seconds?

This is a VERY challenging datapack. But why not make it even more difficult by turning on Hardcore? I have seen one of my friends beat this challenge before so it is possible but very very difficult.

## FAQ
**Does this work on a server?**
Yes. Go into your servers folders and go to `world -> datapacks` and put the datapack there. This datapack works multiplayer so play with however many people you would like!

**Can I use this in a YouTube video?**
Of course! Well it is not required I would appreciate you linking the datapack in your video description or mentioning where to find it in the video though! You can also contact me and I will feature the video on this page!

## Support us!
Join my Minecraft server **Zonerush.minekeep.gg** for a unique PvP gamemode!
